overview.description: The TrueShares Seasonality Laddered Buffered ETF (ONEZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds aiming for a unique laddered approach to manage market volatility and growth. The fund primarily invests in TrueShares buffered and hedged ETFs, actively tilting the hedge weighting for market seasonality ONEZ was launched on Jan 24, 2025 and is issued by Truemark Group.

data.title: A better 'buffer?': Here's what you need to know
data.text: Mike Loukas, TrueShares ETFs CEO, joins CNBC's Dom Chu to discuss buffered & hedged ETFs.
